response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Phonetics for 'Orpheus' and 'Caramel Pain' perfectly match the provided reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics utilized for transcription; manual translation performed for 'Caramel Pain' English and all banter segments. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps strictly anchored to vocal onset. Included prominent visual text (band credits, song title) as distinct subtitle events.

subtitles.original: Here we go!
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: First up on the drums, we got Genki!
subtitles.english: First up on the drums, we got Genki!

subtitles.original: Drums 白川 玄太
subtitles.english: [Drums: Genki Shirakawa]

subtitles.original: Then on the bass, it's Yu Park!
subtitles.english: Then on the bass, it's Yu Park!

subtitles.original: Bass / MP Yu Park
subtitles.english: [Bass / MP: Yu Park]

subtitles.original: And on the guitar, it's Yoshi!
subtitles.english: And on the guitar, it's Yoshi!

subtitles.original: Guitar 芳賀 義彦
subtitles.english: [Guitar: Yoshihiko Haga]

subtitles.original: And last but not least, tonight's manipulator is Hana!
subtitles.english: And last but not least, tonight's manipulator is Hana!

subtitles.original: Manipulator 大場 映岳-hana-
subtitles.english: [Manipulator: Hana]

subtitles.original: All right Nerissa, let's take 'em out!
subtitles.english: All right Nerissa, let's take 'em out!

subtitles.original: Sounds good! Here we go!
subtitles.english: Sounds good! Here we go!

subtitles.original: Orpheus, get me going, take me space with the bass and the judgment!
subtitles.english: Orpheus, get me going, take me space with the bass and the judgment!

subtitles.original: So let's blow this joint and if the feelings fight then we can make a little music of our own tonight. Come on!
subtitles.english: So let's blow this joint and if the feelings fight then we can make a little music of our own tonight. Come on!

subtitles.original: Orpheus, get me going, take me space with the bass and the judgment!
subtitles.english: Orpheus, get me going, take me space with the bass and the judgment!

subtitles.original: Why you walking away? I got a lot to say. Guess I'll save up for the next one.
subtitles.english: Why you walking away? I got a lot to say. Guess I'll save up for the next one.

subtitles.original: I ain't trying to stress you, I must confess though my heart's been into us.
subtitles.english: I ain't trying to stress you, I must confess though my heart's been into us.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah? So hear me out, Orpheus, I'm thinking next time I'll show you what I really want to do.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah? So hear me out, Orpheus, I'm thinking next time I'll show you what I really want to do.

subtitles.original: Bye Nerissa! Thanks for singing with me!
subtitles.english: Bye Nerissa! Thanks for singing with me!

subtitles.original: Have a good rest of your birthday live!
subtitles.english: Have a good rest of your birthday live!

subtitles.original: Yes! See you later! Love you too, bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Yes! See you later! Love you too, bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ねえ あたしいつも勇気が足りないから
subtitles.english: Hey, I always lack the courage,

subtitles.original: 自分を大切にできないんだ
subtitles.english: so I can't take care of myself.

subtitles.original: 痛い目をみないと気付けやしないんだ
subtitles.english: I don't realize it unless I get hurt.

subtitles.original: あーあ 今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, today it's caramel pain again.

subtitles.original: Caramel Pain
subtitles.english: [Song: Caramel Pain]

subtitles.original: 良い子でなんかいられないよ
subtitles.english: I can't stay a good girl.

subtitles.original: だって世界はこんなにも極彩色で
subtitles.english: Because the world is so full of vivid colors,

subtitles.original: 甘ったるくて苦いし
subtitles.english: it's sugary sweet and bitter.

subtitles.original: あ、待って頭痛いし
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, my head hurts,

subtitles.original: ヘトヘトで漂うだけの 24/7
subtitles.english: just drifting around exhausted, 24/7.

subtitles.original: ギリギリ感情おさえるなんてもう無理
subtitles.english: I can't keep my emotions in check anymore.

subtitles.original: このままではいられないの日々
subtitles.english: In these days where I can't stay like this.

subtitles.original: ちょっとこわいけど
subtitles.english: It's a little scary, but...

subtitles.original: 置いてくよ 置いてくよ 置いてくよ
subtitles.english: I'm leaving it behind, leaving it behind.

subtitles.original: 今まで手にしたイデオロギーもスタイルも
subtitles.english: The ideologies and styles I've held onto,

subtitles.original: 壊れちゃっても 今がいいよ
subtitles.english: even if they break, this moment is better.

subtitles.original: だってあたしはあたしのままでずっといたいんだもん
subtitles.english: Because I want to stay as myself forever.

subtitles.original: ルート？ ムード？ どうでもいーよ
subtitles.english: Route? Mood? I don't care about any of it.

subtitles.original: トゥーザネクスト もっと危ないことしたら勝ちなんでしょ
subtitles.english: To the next, it's a win if you do something riskier.

subtitles.original: 何を犠牲にしたってしょうがないんだよ
subtitles.english: It can't be helped, no matter the sacrifice.

subtitles.original: フロムマイベッド この胸の痛みだけ抱いて
subtitles.english: From my bed, holding only this pain in my chest.

subtitles.original: あーあ 今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, today it's caramel pain again.

subtitles.original: ミルフィーユみたいにはぐらかしたって
subtitles.english: Even if I dodge it like a mille-feuille,

subtitles.original: いつかバレちゃうよ 腐っちゃうよ
subtitles.english: it'll be found out eventually, it'll rot away.

subtitles.original: 痛いとか素直に君に言えてれば
subtitles.english: If I could have told you honestly that it hurts,

subtitles.original: 今頃何か変わってたのかもね
subtitles.english: maybe something would have changed by now.

subtitles.original: 好きなアニメもなくなっちゃうし
subtitles.english: Even the anime I love will disappear,

subtitles.original: 好きな人だっていなくなっちゃうんだ
subtitles.english: and the people I love will be gone too.

subtitles.original: 寂しくなっちゃうな
subtitles.english: It makes me so lonely.

subtitles.original: 大切なことは ただ一つだけさ
subtitles.english: There's only one thing that's important.

subtitles.original: もう後悔しないように 前を向いて生きるということ！
subtitles.english: To live looking forward so I won't regret anything!

subtitles.original: 置いてくよ 置いてくよ 置いてくよ
subtitles.english: I'm leaving it behind, leaving it behind.

subtitles.original: 今まで手にしたイデオロギーもスタイルも
subtitles.english: The ideologies and styles I've held onto,

subtitles.original: 汚れちゃっても 気にしないよ
subtitles.english: even if they're stained, I don't care.

subtitles.original: だってあたしはあたしに恋してたいんだもん
subtitles.english: Because I want to be in love with myself.

subtitles.original: 愛してるよ 愛してるよ 愛してるよ
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you, I love you.

subtitles.original: さよならなんて涙が出ちゃうけど
subtitles.english: A goodbye makes the tears come out, but...

subtitles.original: 何を犠牲にしたってしょうがないんだよ
subtitles.english: it can't be helped, no matter the sacrifice.

subtitles.original: フロムマイベッド この胸の痛みだけ抱いて
subtitles.english: From my bed, holding only this pain in my chest.

subtitles.original: あーあ 今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, today it's caramel pain again.

subtitles.original: ねえ あたしいつも勇気が足りないから
subtitles.english: Hey, I always lack the courage,

subtitles.original: 自分を大切にできないんだ
subtitles.english: so I can't take care of myself.

subtitles.original: 痛いくらいなら 少し我慢するんだ
subtitles.english: If it's going to hurt, I'll just bear it a little.

subtitles.original: あーあ 今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, today it's caramel pain again.

subtitles.original: Yay! Suisei-senpai is here!
subtitles.english: Yay! Suisei-senpai is here!

subtitles.original: Yeah! The best!
subtitles.english: Yeah! The best!

subtitles.original: We did it!
subtitles.english: We did it!

subtitles.original: It's been a while, but welcome!
subtitles.english: It's been a while, but welcome!

subtitles.original: Happy Birthday!
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you! Please introduce yourself.
subtitles.english: Thank you! Please introduce yourself.

subtitles.original: A shooting star, a diamond in the rough! Idol vtuber Hoshimachi Suisei!
subtitles.english: A shooting star, a diamond in the rough! Idol vtuber Hoshimachi Suisei!

subtitles.original: Calliope, Happy Birthday!
subtitles.english: Calliope, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much! It's my birthday!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! It's my birthday!

subtitles.original: And it's also your 4th anniversary since your major debut!
subtitles.english: And it's also your 4th anniversary since your major debut!

subtitles.original: That's right! Wow, 4 years, it's been a long time. Thank you!
subtitles.english: That's right! Wow, 4 years, it's been a long time. Thank you!

subtitles.original: It's amazing! We sang together!
subtitles.english: It's amazing! We sang together!

subtitles.original: Yeah, four years ago!
subtitles.english: Yeah, four years ago!
